fact_nuggets.text: Friend Guard (Japanese: Friend Guard) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Friend Guard reduces the damage that other allied Pokemon receive from attacks (from any Pokemon) by 25%. It does not reduce the damage dealt by moves that deal direct damage . It does not affect the Pokemon with the Ability itself. If multiple of a Pokemon's allies have Friend Guard, Friend Guard stacks multiplicatively. For example, if both of a Pokemon's allies have Friend Guard in a Triple Battle , the damage that that Pokemon receives is multiplied by 9/16 (56.25%), which is a damage reduction of 43.75%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Friend Guard has no effect outside of battle.

For example, if both of a Pokemon's allies have Friend Guard in a Triple Battle , the damage that that Pokemon receives is multiplied by 9/16 (56.25%), which is a damage reduction of 43.75%.
Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokemon to 0.75.
